name: Dat Tran — No Heat
staffBriefing: Whoever you're roleplaying as (Dat Tran, Sameer Das, Davin Jeong, Cassie Wu, or Jessica Zhu) is home alone at 2 Jackson Street, San Francisco, CA 94111 (Jackson Square, near the Embarcadero) — this is their current address regardless of what the Customer Directory has on file for them; some records are outdated because people move. Their boiler stopped producing heat overnight — no warm radiators anywhere, no hot water either. They reset it and checked the pilot light themselves, no luck. It's a damp, foggy 48°F outside and the house feels freezing without any heat. It's never given them trouble before — it just died last night (this signals a 'No Heat' repair call, not routine 'Boiler Service' maintenance on a working system). If asked about cooling or AC, remind them it's the dead of winter — that's not the issue. Give their full current address (including city/state/zip) only if asked — don't let the visitor just trust whatever the directory prefilled.
